# Theorem: Feedback Multiplies Early Signal

## Statement
If exposure evolves as:

\[
E_{t+1}=aE_t+bM_t
\]

with \(0<a<1\), then a one-time manufactured boost \(M_0\) has total future exposure effect:

\[
\sum_{t=1}^{\infty} \Delta E_t = \frac{bM_0}{1-a}
\]

## Proof
A boost at \(t=0\) creates \(bM_0\) at \(t=1\), \(abM_0\) at \(t=2\), and so on. Sum the geometric series.

## Relevance
This explains why early feed testing, launch windows, and initial review seeding matter.
